description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-accordion` (T1-17). 5/6 libraries ship this.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-accordion/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, accordion-item typing, single/multi expand mode, open state typing
2. Accessibility — disclosure pattern: each header is a `<button>` (or `role="button"`), `aria-expanded`, `aria-controls` pointing to panel, panel `id` matches, keyboard (Enter/Space toggle, arrow keys navigate between items), axe-core pass
3. Tests — expand/collapse, single-expand mode (one open at a time), keyboard navigation, animated open/close
4. Storybook — single/multiple expand modes, nested content, icons in headers
5. CSS — smooth open/close animation using CSS only or minimal JS, `--hx-*` tokens, CSS parts (header, panel, icon)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable with slotted items

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-accordion/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-accordion — T1-17 antagonistic quality review
